---
title: "Occupational Accident Data"
format: html
---

## Occupational Accident Data

This section will include interactive visual tools for occupational accident and safety statistics.

### Planned tools

- Annual accident trends
- Fatal and non-fatal accidents
- Sectoral distribution
- Gender and age comparisons
- Time-series visualisation

::: {=html}
<div class="tool-note">
Interactive occupational accident explorer coming soon.
</div>
:::
